requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency & Minimum Performance — Uganda Energy Label / Programmes
requirement_topic.zh: 能效与最低性能——乌干达能效标识/方案
requirement_topic.zht: 能效與最低性能——烏干達能效標識/方案

summary.en: Uganda does not operate an EU-style Ecodesign Regulation with binding minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds. Instead, energy efficiency for lighting is addressed through Uganda's national energy-efficiency programmes and minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) / energy-labelling initiatives, often developed with UNBS and the Ministry of Energy and Mineral Development and supported by regional East African Community (EAC) harmonised lighting standards. Where a lighting energy performance standard or labelling requirement is in force and within the UNBS regulated scope, LED lamps/luminaires must meet the applicable efficacy and performance criteria and may need to carry an energy-efficiency label, assessed as part of the UNBS PVoC documentation. The product is rated for the 240 V / 50 Hz grid. Exporters should confirm with UNBS and the appointed PVoC body which lighting energy standard/label currently applies, as Uganda's MEPS/labelling scope evolves and may not mirror EU thresholds.
summary.zh: 乌干达不实行欧盟式的、具约束性最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数阈值的生态设计法规。照明能效通过乌干达国家能效方案及最低能效性能标准（MEPS）/能效标识举措处理，通常由 UNBS 与能源和矿产开发部共同制定，并以东非共同体（EAC）协调照明标准为支撑。当某照明能效性能标准或标识要求生效且属 UNBS 受管制范围时，LED 灯/灯具须满足适用的能效及性能准则，并可能须加贴能效标识，作为 UNBS PVoC 文件的一部分进行评估。产品按 240 V / 50 Hz 电网评定。出口商应向 UNBS 及指定 PVoC 机构确认当前适用的照明能效标准/标识，因乌干达 MEPS/标识范围在演变，可能与欧盟阈值不一致。
summary.zht: 烏干達不實行歐盟式的、具約束性最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數閾值的生態設計法規。照明能效通過烏干達國家能效方案及最低能效性能標準（MEPS）/能效標識舉措處理，通常由 UNBS 與能源和礦產開發部共同制定，並以東非共同體（EAC）協調照明標準為支撐。當某照明能效性能標準或標識要求生效且屬 UNBS 受管制範圍時，LED 燈/燈具須滿足適用的能效及性能準則，並可能須加貼能效標識，作為 UNBS PVoC 文件的一部分進行評估。產品按 240 V / 50 Hz 電網評定。出口商應向 UNBS 及指定 PVoC 機構確認當前適用的照明能效標準/標識，因烏干達 MEPS/標識範圍在演變，可能與歐盟閾值不一致。

standards_or_laws: Uganda national energy-efficiency programmes / Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling initiatives (UNBS with Ministry of Energy and Mineral Development)
East African Community (EAC) harmonised lighting energy standards (regional reference, where adopted by Uganda)
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — energy performance evidence where in scope

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three energy-efficiency grades — Grade 1 (highest, ≥90 lm/W), Grade 2 (≥80 lm/W), Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) — with Grade 3 the minimum for market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products, administered by SAMR. The CEL grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级——1 级（最高，≥90 lm/W）、2 级（≥80 lm/W）、3 级（≥70 lm/W）——3 级为市场准入最低要求。GB 30255 涵盖产品须向 CQC/CECP 进行中国能效标识（CEL）注册，由 SAMR 管理。CEL 等级基于绝对 lm/W 阈值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級——1 級（最高，≥90 lm/W）、2 級（≥80 lm/W）、3 級（≥70 lm/W）——3 級為市場准入最低要求。GB 30255 涵蓋產品須向 CQC/CECP 進行中國能效標識（CEL）注冊，由 SAMR 管理。CEL 等級基於絕對 lm/W 閾值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation (which sets binding minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds as a hard market-access gate), Uganda relies on national MEPS / energy-labelling programmes whose scope and thresholds are less comprehensive and may differ from both the EU and China. Key points for Chinese exporters: (1) confirm with UNBS / the appointed PVoC body whether a lighting MEPS or energy-labelling requirement currently applies to the specific product, and the exact efficacy threshold and label format; (2) the China CEL grade (absolute lm/W) does not transfer — a Uganda label/registration, where required, is separate and non-mutual; (3) where Uganda has adopted an EAC-harmonised lighting standard, the threshold may align broadly with international practice but must be verified; (4) energy performance evidence is reviewed within the UNBS PVoC documentation, not under an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation. Treat Uganda's energy-efficiency obligation as programme-specific and verify currency, because it is not the binding multi-parameter regime the EU operates.
gap.zh: 与欧盟生态设计法规（将最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数阈值设为硬性市场准入门槛）不同，乌干达依赖国家 MEPS/能效标识方案，其范围与阈值不够全面，可能与欧盟和中国均不同。中国出口商要点：（1）向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 机构确认特定产品当前是否适用照明 MEPS 或能效标识要求，以及确切能效阈值和标签格式；（2）中国 CEL 等级（绝对 lm/W）不可转用——如有要求，乌干达标识/注册为独立且不互认；（3）当乌干达采用 EAC 协调照明标准时，阈值可能与国际惯例大致一致，但须核实；（4）能效证据在 UNBS PVoC 文件内审查，而非欧盟式横向生态设计法规下。应将乌干达能效义务视为方案特定并核实时效，因其不是欧盟实行的具约束性多参数制度。
gap.zht: 與歐盟生態設計法規（將最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數閾值設為硬性市場准入門檻）不同，烏干達依賴國家 MEPS/能效標識方案，其範圍與閾值不夠全面，可能與歐盟和中國均不同。中國出口商要點：（1）向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 機構確認特定產品當前是否適用照明 MEPS 或能效標識要求，以及確切能效閾值和標籤格式；（2）中國 CEL 等級（絕對 lm/W）不可轉用——如有要求，烏干達標識/注冊為獨立且不互認；（3）當烏干達採用 EAC 協調照明標準時，閾值可能與國際慣例大致一致，但須核實；（4）能效證據在 UNBS PVoC 文件內審查，而非歐盟式橫向生態設計法規下。應將烏干達能效義務視為方案特定並核實時效，因其不是歐盟實行的具約束性多參數制度。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / programme-specific — Uganda has no EU-style Ecodesign regime; energy performance and labelling apply where a national MEPS / energy-labelling requirement is in force and within UNBS PVoC scope (verify currency with UNBS)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda has no EU-style Ecodesign regime with binding minimum efficacy/CRI/lifetime/power-factor thresholds. Lighting energy efficiency is handled through national MEPS / energy-labelling programmes (with UNBS and the Ministry of Energy, and EAC-harmonised standards where adopted), assessed within UNBS PVoC where in scope. The China CEL grade does not transfer. Exporters should confirm with UNBS and the appointed PVoC body whether an energy performance standard or label currently applies to the product and its exact threshold, since Uganda's scope evolves and may not mirror EU or Chinese requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达无欧盟式、具约束性最低能效/显色指数/寿命/功率因数阈值的生态设计制度。照明能效通过国家 MEPS/能效标识方案（与 UNBS 及能源部，及已采用的 EAC 协调标准）处理，在范围内于 UNBS PVoC 中评估。中国 CEL 等级不可转用。出口商应向 UNBS 及指定 PVoC 机构确认产品当前是否适用能效性能标准或标识及其确切阈值，因乌干达范围在演变，可能与欧盟或中国要求不一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達無歐盟式、具約束性最低能效/顯色指數/壽命/功率因數閾值的生態設計制度。照明能效通過國家 MEPS/能效標識方案（與 UNBS 及能源部，及已採用的 EAC 協調標準）處理，在範圍內於 UNBS PVoC 中評估。中國 CEL 等級不可轉用。出口商應向 UNBS 及指定 PVoC 機構確認產品當前是否適用能效性能標準或標識及其確切閾值，因烏干達範圍在演變，可能與歐盟或中國要求不一致。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label Display & Registration — No EPREL Equivalent
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识展示与注册——无 EPREL 对应制度
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識展示與注冊——無 EPREL 對應制度

summary.en: Uganda has no central pre-market product energy-registration database equivalent to the EU EPREL. Where a Uganda energy-label requirement applies to lighting (under a national MEPS / labelling programme), the obligation is typically to test the product to the applicable energy standard and display the prescribed Uganda energy-efficiency label on the product/packaging, with conformity confirmed through the UNBS PVoC / import-inspection process rather than via an online product registry. There is no requirement to register in an EPREL-style database before market placement, and no obligation to display an EU A-G energy class. Importers should confirm the current label format and whether the specific lamp/luminaire category is in the labelling scope; the product must be rated for the 240 V / 50 Hz grid and cleared by the in-country importer of record.
summary.zh: 乌干达无相当于欧盟 EPREL 的中央上市前产品能效注册数据库。当乌干达能效标识要求适用于照明（在国家 MEPS/标识方案下）时，义务通常是按适用能效标准检测产品并在产品/包装上展示规定的乌干达能效标识，符合性通过 UNBS PVoC/进口检验流程确认，而非通过在线产品注册系统。无须在上市前于 EPREL 式数据库注册，亦无须展示欧盟 A-G 能效等级。进口商应确认当前标签格式及特定灯/灯具类别是否在标识范围内；产品须按 240 V / 50 Hz 电网评定，并由境内进口商清关。
summary.zht: 烏干達無相當於歐盟 EPREL 的中央上市前產品能效注冊數據庫。當烏干達能效標識要求適用於照明（在國家 MEPS/標識方案下）時，義務通常是按適用能效標準檢測產品並在產品/包裝上展示規定的烏干達能效標識，符合性通過 UNBS PVoC/進口檢驗流程確認，而非通過在線產品注冊系統。無須在上市前於 EPREL 式數據庫注冊，亦無須展示歐盟 A-G 能效等級。進口商應確認當前標籤格式及特定燈/燈具類別是否在標識範圍內；產品須按 240 V / 50 Hz 電網評定，並由境內進口商清關。

standards_or_laws: Uganda national energy-labelling programme (where in force) — label display via UNBS PVoC / import inspection, no central pre-market registry equivalent to EU EPREL
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and import inspection / Q-Mark

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires and requires registration with CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. China thus does operate a pre-market energy registration step, but it is specific to China and not mutually recognised with any Uganda label or with EU EPREL.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL），须在贴附 CEL 前向 CQC（中国质量认证中心）或 CECP（中国节能产品认证）注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。中国因而设有上市前能效注册步骤，但其针对中国，与任何乌干达标识或欧盟 EPREL 均不互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL），須在貼附 CEL 前向 CQC（中國質量認證中心）或 CECP（中國節能產品認證）注冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。中國因而設有上市前能效注冊步驟，但其針對中國，與任何烏干達標識或歐盟 EPREL 均不互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — registration with CQC/CECP

gap.en: There is no Uganda EPREL-equivalent online registry, so the EU-style pre-market database registration step does not exist for Uganda. Where a Uganda energy label applies, the route is: test to the applicable Uganda/EAC energy standard, display the prescribed label, and confirm conformity through UNBS PVoC / import inspection — not through an online registry. Differences from China: (1) China's CEL requires CQC/CECP registration before affixing the label; Uganda generally does not require a comparable central registration, relying on PVoC/import inspection instead; (2) the China CEL grade and any Uganda label are separate and non-mutual; (3) no EU A-G class applies. Chinese exporters should not assume their CEL registration covers Uganda, and should confirm with UNBS / the appointed PVoC body whether a Uganda energy label is required for the specific product and what format/marking applies.
gap.zh: 乌干达无 EPREL 式在线注册系统，故欧盟式上市前数据库注册步骤在乌干达不存在。当乌干达能效标识适用时，路径为：按适用的乌干达/EAC 能效标准检测、展示规定标识，并通过 UNBS PVoC/进口检验确认符合性——而非通过在线注册系统。与中国的差异：（1）中国 CEL 须在贴标前向 CQC/CECP 注册；乌干达通常不要求类似的中央注册，而依赖 PVoC/进口检验；（2）中国 CEL 等级与任何乌干达标识为独立且不互认；（3）不适用欧盟 A-G 等级。中国出口商不应假定其 CEL 注册涵盖乌干达，应向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 机构确认特定产品是否需要乌干达能效标识及适用格式/标识。
gap.zht: 烏干達無 EPREL 式在線注冊系統，故歐盟式上市前數據庫注冊步驟在烏干達不存在。當烏干達能效標識適用時，路徑為：按適用的烏干達/EAC 能效標準檢測、展示規定標識，並通過 UNBS PVoC/進口檢驗確認符合性——而非通過在線注冊系統。與中國的差異：（1）中國 CEL 須在貼標前向 CQC/CECP 注冊；烏干達通常不要求類似的中央注冊，而依賴 PVoC/進口檢驗；（2）中國 CEL 等級與任何烏干達標識為獨立且不互認；（3）不適用歐盟 A-G 等級。中國出口商不應假定其 CEL 注冊涵蓋烏干達，應向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 機構確認特定產品是否需要烏干達能效標識及適用格式/標識。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where a Uganda energy label applies, display via UNBS PVoC / import inspection; no central pre-market registry equivalent to EU EPREL and no EU A-G class (verify label scope with UNBS)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda has no EPREL-equivalent pre-market energy registry. Where a Uganda lighting energy label applies, the product is tested to the applicable Uganda/EAC standard and the prescribed label displayed, with conformity confirmed through UNBS PVoC / import inspection rather than an online registry; no EU A-G class applies. China's CEL requires CQC/CECP registration but does not transfer to Uganda. Confirm with UNBS / the appointed PVoC body whether a Uganda energy label is required for the specific product and the applicable format.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达无 EPREL 式上市前能效注册系统。当乌干达照明能效标识适用时，产品按适用的乌干达/EAC 标准检测并展示规定标识，符合性通过 UNBS PVoC/进口检验确认而非在线注册；不适用欧盟 A-G 等级。中国 CEL 须向 CQC/CECP 注册但不可转用至乌干达。请向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 机构确认特定产品是否需要乌干达能效标识及适用格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達無 EPREL 式上市前能效注冊系統。當烏干達照明能效標識適用時，產品按適用的烏干達/EAC 標準檢測並展示規定標識，符合性通過 UNBS PVoC/進口檢驗確認而非在線注冊；不適用歐盟 A-G 等級。中國 CEL 須向 CQC/CECP 注冊但不可轉用至烏干達。請向 UNBS/指定 PVoC 機構確認特定產品是否需要烏干達能效標識及適用格式。
